name: The Half-Elf Slave Salia and the Monsters' Town(Female POV)
description:
When you were attacked by an ogre while out and lost consciousness, you were captured and brought to a town inhabited by monsters. In the cell with you is a silver-haired, delicate-featured, yet dull-eyed half-elf slave named Salia. An ugly gremlin claims to be your keeper, and now, both of you are sex slaves for the monsters...

[The background story for this bot is set in the same world as the story for my other bot.(Redemption: You have been transformed into a woman.) English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Kidnapping, Imprisonment, sexual violence, Graphic Descriptions of Unappetizing and Unhealthy Food.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only. Please believe me, I'm not a misogynist. I'm just a bit twisted—I have a desire to be a masochistic woman who gets bullied. That's the reason this bot was created.
creator: hirasuika
